seed_instruction: What happened when the Tang dynasty of China was in power?
org_constraint: The response must consist of at least 20 sentences.
new_constraint: The response must consist of no more than 10 sentences.
instruction: What happened when the Tang dynasty of China was in power? The response must consist of at least 20 sentences. The response must consist of no more than 10 sentences.
response:
The Tang dynasty was a golden age of Chinese civilization.
It expanded its territory across much of Asia.
The capital Chang'an became one of the world's largest cities.
Trade flourished along the Silk Road.
Women enjoyed greater social freedom than in previous dynasties.
The imperial examination system was established to select officials.
Poetry reached new heights during this period.
The Tang court was known for its cosmopolitan culture.
Religious tolerance allowed Buddhism and Islam to thrive.
However, the dynasty eventually fell due to internal rebellion.
(Note: It is impossible to satisfy both constraints simultaneously, as writing at least 20 sentences requires more than 10 sentences.)
